# Zonoir

> Zonoir is Pakistan's leading EMR (Electronic Medical Record) and clinic management platform for doctors and clinics.

> [!NOTE]
> This is a summary version. For the complete dynamically generated llms.txt with all 400+ doctor profiles (with headings and bios), visit:
> https://anqhnkcppujulkugcpee.supabase.co/functions/v1/dynamic-llms-txt

## About

Zonoir provides EMR software, appointment booking, patient management, visit records, prescription templates, financial tracking, and public doctor profiles for patient discovery — designed for healthcare providers in Pakistan.

## Key Features

- EMR Software: Digital patient records, visit history, prescriptions, medical documents
- Appointment Management: Online booking, walk-ins, waitlist, calendar views
- Clinic Management: Multi-doctor support, receptionist access, specializations, expenses
- Doctor Profiles: Public searchable profiles with qualifications, schedule, clinic locations
- Billing & Finance: Consultation fees, procedure fees, invoices, payment tracking
